title: Snacks And Movie Tickets
body: This Mod Adds Snacks To Minecraft And Movie Tickets You Can Eat The Popcorn The Movie Tickets Are Just For Show Search Popcorn Or Ticket To Find Them In The Creative Menu Moving On As Of The Latest Update We Have Added Takis And Thats It Search [Pizza] [Takis] In The Creative Menu To Find Them You Can Also Make All Of Them In Survival Mode The Recipes Are In Gallery
